summary: Stability fixes — startup issues, smoother charts, and less noise.
release_notes: Fixed app crash and connection preference not applying on startup (Windows).
Fixed L2 depth flickering and stale prices when switching tickers.
Fixed chart not auto-scrolling with new candles and showing flat bars when market is quiet.
Chart and Time & Sales now show 'No live data available' when no market data is streaming.
Fixed 'Orders request timed out' error appearing on startup.
Fixed hotkey grid disappearing when trading terminal is docked on fresh start.
Alert sounds now play once per scan instead of repeating for every new item.
